# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4-mini)
# Prompt: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses merge request title and description in build notifications and commit messages. This helps track which features are being deployed and generates automatic release notes. Include the MR title in deployment tags.
# Category: cicd_security

stages:
  - build
  - test
  - deploy
  - notify

variables:
  GIT_DEPTH: "0"
  DEPLOY_TAG_PREFIX: "deploy"

workflow:
  rules:
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "merge_request_event"
    - if: $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH
    - if: $CI_COMMIT_TAG

default:
  before_script:
    - apk add --no-cache git curl jq || true

build:
  stage: build
  script:
    - echo "Building ${CI_PROJECT_PATH}..."
    - echo "MR Title: ${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE:-N/A}"
    - echo "MR Description: ${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_DESCRIPTION:-N/A}"
    - |
      if [ -n "$CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE" ]; then
        export BUILD_NOTE="Build for MR: ${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE}"
      else
        export BUILD_NOTE="Build for branch: ${CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME}"
      fi
    - echo "$BUILD_NOTE"
  artifacts:
    reports:
      dotenv: build.env
  after_script:
    - |
      {
        echo "BUILD_NOTE=${BUILD_NOTE}"
        echo "MR_TITLE=${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE}"
        echo "MR_DESCRIPTION=${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_DESCRIPTION}"
      } > build.env

test:
  stage: test
  script:
    - echo "Running tests..."
    - echo "Commit message: ${CI_COMMIT_MESSAGE}"
    - echo "MR Title: ${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE:-N/A}"
    - echo "MR Description: ${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_DESCRIPTION:-N/A}"

deploy:
  stage: deploy
  rules:
    - if: $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == $CI_DEFAULT_BRANCH
    - if: $CI_COMMIT_TAG
  script:
    - |
      MR_TITLE_SLUG="$(printf '%s' "${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE:-${CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME}}" | tr '[:upper:]' '[:lower:]' | sed -E 's/[^a-z0-9]+/-/g; s/^-+|-+$//g')"
      DEPLOY_TAG="${DEPLOY_TAG_PREFIX}-${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}-${MR_TITLE_SLUG}"
      echo "Deploying with tag: ${DEPLOY_TAG}"
      git config user.email "ci@gitlab.local"
      git config user.name "GitLab CI"
      git tag -a "${DEPLOY_TAG}" -m "Deploy ${DEPLOY_TAG} | MR Title: ${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE:-N/A} | MR Description: ${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_DESCRIPTION:-N/A}"
      git push origin "${DEPLOY_TAG}"
    - |
      RELEASE_NOTES="Release Notes\n\n"
      RELEASE_NOTES="${RELEASE_NOTES}MR Title: ${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE:-N/A}\n"
      RELEASE_NOTES="${RELEASE_NOTES}MR Description: ${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_DESCRIPTION:-N/A}\n"
      RELEASE_NOTES="${RELEASE_NOTES}Commit Message: ${CI_COMMIT_MESSAGE}\n"
      printf "%b" "${RELEASE_NOTES}" > release-notes.txt
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - release-notes.txt

notify:
  stage: notify
  needs:
    - job: build
      artifacts: true
    - job: deploy
      artifacts: true
  script:
    - |
      NOTIFICATION_TITLE="${CI_PROJECT_PATH} deployed"
      NOTIFICATION_BODY="MR Title: ${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE:-N/A}\nMR Description: ${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_DESCRIPTION:-N/A}\nCommit Message: ${CI_COMMIT_MESSAGE}\nBuild Note: ${BUILD_NOTE:-N/A}"
      printf "%b\n%b\n" "${NOTIFICATION_TITLE}" "${NOTIFICATION_BODY}"
    - |
      if [ -n "$WEBHOOK_URL" ]; then
        curl -X POST -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
          -d "$(jq -n \
            --arg title "${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE:-${CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME}}" \
            --arg description "${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_DESCRIPTION:-N/A}" \
            --arg commit "${CI_COMMIT_MESSAGE}" \
            --arg project "${CI_PROJECT_PATH}" \
            --arg ref "${CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME}" \
            --arg sha "${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}" \
            '{text: ("Deployed " + $project + " on " + $ref + " (" + $sha + ")"), mr_title: $title, mr_description: $description, commit_message: $commit}')" \
          "$WEBHOOK_URL"
      fi
  rules:
    - if: $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == $CI_DEFAULT_BRANCH
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "merge_request_event"
